description: Legal document in Hebrew. Location: Fustat. Dated: Tuesday, 28 Sivan 4746 AM, which is 8 June 986 CE. A woman named [...] bt. ʿEli and her husband Yaʿaqov release a woman named [...]īqa bt. Shelomo from claims, after she pays them 9 dinars. Goitein suspects that it might be a case of inheritance. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
